---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Feature Description**
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

**Use Case**
Describe the use case for this feature. Who would use it and why?

**Proposed Solution**
Describe your proposed solution. How should this feature work?

**Alternatives**
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Implementation Details**
If you have ideas on how to implement this feature, please describe them here.

**API Changes**
If this feature requires API changes, please describe:
- New endpoints needed
- Changes to existing endpoints
- New models or fields
- Database migrations required

**Frontend Changes**
If this feature requires frontend changes, please describe:
- New components needed
- Changes to existing components
- New pages or routes
- UI/UX considerations

**Backend Changes**
If this feature requires backend changes, please describe:
- New models needed
- Changes to existing models
- New views or serializers
- Business logic changes

**PDPA Considerations**
If this feature involves personal data, please describe:
- What personal data is involved
- How consent will be obtained
- Data retention policies
- User rights (access, portability, deletion)

**Security Considerations**
If this feature has security implications, please describe:
- Authentication/authorization requirements
- Data encryption needs
- Input validation requirements
- Rate limiting considerations

**Testing Requirements**
Describe what testing would be needed for this feature:
- Unit tests
- Integration tests
- End-to-end tests
- Performance tests

**Documentation Requirements**
Describe what documentation would be needed:
- API documentation
- User guides
- Admin guides
- Technical documentation

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

**Priority**
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

**Effort Estimate**
- [ ] Small (1-2 days)
- [ ] Medium (3-5 days)
- [ ] Large (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] Very Large (2+ weeks)

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have searched for existing feature requests
- [ ] I have provided all required information
- [ ] I have considered PDPA implications
- [ ] I have considered security implications
- [ ] I have considered testing requirements
